title: vicioides lutea
intro: Vicioides lutea, also known as the Yellow Vetchling or Horseshoe Vetch, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Vicioides lutea has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, and is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine to make poultices and salves.
